nasb.text: O send out Your light and Your truth, let them lead me; Let them bring me to Your holy hill And to Your dwelling places.

esv.text: Send out your light and your truth; let them lead me; let them bring me to your holy hill and to your dwelling!

cnv.text: 求你發出你的亮光和真理，好引導我， 帶我到你的聖山， 到你的居所。

ccb.text: 求你以光明和真理引导我， 领我到你的圣山，到你的居所。

csbs.text: 求你发出你的光和真理， 愿它们引导我， 将我带到你的圣山， 带到你的住所。
